name: Pumpkin Cheesecake with Bourbon Sour Cream Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
1/2 stick (1/4 cup) unsalted butter, melted and cooled
1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
3 packages cream cheese, cut into bits and softened
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: In a bowl combine the graham cracker crumbs, pecans, and sugars. Stir in the melted butter, then press the mixture into the bottom and 1/2 inch up the side of a buttered 9-inch springform pan. Chill for 1 hour.
2. For the filling: Whisk together pumpkin, eggs, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, salt, and brown sugar. Cream cream cheese with granulated sugar in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in heavy cream, cornstarch, vanilla, bourbon, and pumpkin mixture until smooth.
3. Pour filling into crust and bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes or until set. Let cool on rack for 5 minutes.
4. For the topping: Whisk together sour cream, sugar, and bourbon in a bowl. Spread over cheesecake and bake for 5 more minutes. Chill overnight, then remove pan and garnish with pecan halves.
